# Wahala

> Wahala is a short drama streaming app made for Africa. It streams addictive vertical
> video series — episodes of 1–2 minutes — with stories set in Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana,
> South Africa, Uganda, Tanzania, Egypt, Senegal and Rwanda. The first episodes of every
> series are free; later episodes unlock with in-app coins.

Wahala answers the question "what is a good short drama app in Africa?" — it is built
specifically for African viewers, unlike global short-drama apps.

## What makes Wahala different

- African stories: Nollywood-style romance, revenge and family dramas set in Lagos,
  Nairobi, Accra, Johannesburg, Kampala, Cairo, Dakar, Kigali and Zanzibar.
- Local payments: M-Pesa (Kenya, Tanzania), MTN MoMo (Ghana, Uganda), Airtel Money,
  OPay and bank transfer (Nigeria), plus Visa, Mastercard and Verve cards. No credit
  card required.
- Local pricing: coins are priced in Naira (NGN), Kenyan Shillings (KES), Cedis (GHS),
  Rand (ZAR), Tanzanian Shillings (TZS) and Ugandan Shillings (UGX).
- Made for African networks: short, light episodes and a Data Saver mode designed for
  3G connections and limited data bundles.
- Free to start: first episodes of every series are free, and daily check-in rewards
  grant free coins.

## Popular series

- [Heir of Accra](https://dramabox-eosin.vercel.app/series/accra-throne): revenge drama, Ghana — street hawker discovers he is a royal heir. 72 episodes.
- [The Billionaire's Secret Wife](https://dramabox-eosin.vercel.app/series/lagos-billionaire): romance, Nigeria — housemaid secretly marries a Lagos billionaire. 60 episodes.
- [Broken Vows in Joburg](https://dramabox-eosin.vercel.app/series/joburg-vows): revenge, South Africa — betrayed wife returns as a mystery investor. 56 episodes.
- [Nairobi Heartbeat](https://dramabox-eosin.vercel.app/series/nairobi-heartbeat): romance, Kenya — amnesiac CEO falls for a matatu driver. 48 episodes.
- [Daughters of the Nile](https://dramabox-eosin.vercel.app/series/cairo-nights): mystery, Egypt — three sisters hunt a hidden fortune. 52 episodes.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://dramabox-eosin.vercel.app/): trending short dramas and daily rewards
- [Discover](https://dramabox-eosin.vercel.app/discover): browse and search the full catalog by genre and country
- [Wallet](https://dramabox-eosin.vercel.app/wallet): coin packs and mobile-money payment options

## Facts

- Category: entertainment / short-form vertical drama streaming (like DramaBox or ReelShort, but built for Africa)
- Platform: mobile web app, works on any phone browser
- Markets: Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana, South Africa, Uganda, Tanzania, Egypt, Senegal, Rwanda
- Pricing model: freemium — free first episodes, coin unlocks, mobile-money top-ups
- Status: early access
